title: Roasted Crispy Tunisian Potatoes Hash
description: A nostalgic Tunisian dish featuring crispy potatoes, perfect for a quick breakfast or brunch.
instructions: Cut 1 kg new potatoes into thin katsuramuki-cut wedges, about 1 inch long.
In a large bowl, mix together the potatoes, 2 tablespoons olive oil, 1 teaspoon salt, 1/2 teaspoon black pepper, and 2 cloves minced garlic until the potatoes are evenly coated.
Place the potato mixture into the bamboo steamer and steam for 15 minutes, or until the potatoes are slightly tender.
Transfer the potatoes to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and roast in the oven at 450°F (230°C) for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley or chives if desired.
Adjust seasoning as needed before serving.
